mapper.sql: id, order_no, order_title, order_content, appeal_type, order_category_id, order_category_name, region_assign_time, region_deadline, urgency, source_dept_name, channel, helper_name, contact_phone, gender, incident_location, address, is_difficult, difficult_content, host_dept_name, assist_dept_name, cc_dept_name, settle_condition, last_operate_time, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, created_org_id, allow_back, allow_back_time, allow_comment

t3.id, t3.order_no, t3.order_title, t3.order_content, t3.appeal_type, t3.order_category_id, t3. order_category_name, t3.region_assign_time, t3.region_deadline, t3.urgency, t3.source_dept_name, t3.channel, t3. helper_name, t3.contact_phone, t3.gender, t3.incident_location, t3.address, t3.is_difficult, t3. difficult_content, t3.host_dept_name, t3.assist_dept_name, t3.cc_dept_name, t3.settle_condition, t3.last_operate_time, t3. created_by, t3.created_time, t3.updated_by, t3.updated_time, t3.created_org_id, t3.allow_back, t3.allow_back_time, t3.allow_comment, t3.assist_status, t3.municipal_host_dept_name, t3.municipal_assist_dept_name, t3.municipal_assign_time, t3.municipal_deadline
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = #{roleCode} ) AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no

SELECT subString_index(t3.order_category_name, '-', 1 ) AS categoryName, COUNT(1) AS total FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no where t3.order_category_name is not null GROUP BY subString_index(t3.order_category_name, '-', 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '处办中' AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no where t3.order_category_name is null

select
FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
t3.order_no in
#{orderNo}

select
FROM normal_work_order t3 WHERE t3.allow_comment = '1' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `work_order_dynamic` t2 WHERE t2.order_no = t3.order_no AND t2.operator_id = #{model.operatorId} AND t2.process_type = '批示' )

select
FROM normal_work_order t3 WHERE t3.allow_comment = '1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM `work_order_dynamic` t2 WHERE t2.order_no = t3.order_no AND t2.operator_id = #{model.operatorId} AND t2.process_type = '批示' )

SELECT t5.* from (SELECT t3.*, "已退回" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '已退回' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "办结" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '办结' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "结案待审" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '结案待审' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "下派跟踪" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '下派跟踪' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "下级已退回" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '下级已退回' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "处办中" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '处办中' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no
union all SELECT t3.*, "待签收" as status FROM normal_work_order t3 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no AS task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '待签收' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) t4 ON t3.order_no = t4.task_order_no) t5
${ew.sqlSegment}
AND (
t5.order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
)
AND t5.order_category_id = #{model.orderCategoryId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(t5.region_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{model.regionDeadlineStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(t5.region_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{model.regionDeadlineEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
